deletion_policy.description: Specifies the policy for deleting secret versions; options are 'DESTROY' to permanently delete or 'DISABLE' to disable prior to deletion.

enabled.description: Indicates whether the secret version is active and accessible.

is_secret_data_base64.description: Indicates whether the secret data is provided as a base64-encoded string; must be true if the input is base64-encoded.

secret.description: Defines the secret data to be stored in the secret version; must be a valid string or binary data.

secret_data_wo.description: Specifies the secret data to store in the Secret Manager, must be base64-encoded and comply with the size limits of Secret Manager.

secret_data_wo_version.description: Defines the secret payload content, which must be a string or binary data, to be stored in Secret Manager.

secret_data.description: Specifies the secret data to store in the Secret Manager, must be base64-encoded and comply with the size limits of Secret Manager.

timeouts.description: Defines the time duration for operations like create, update, or delete actions on secret versions.
